name: apex_iteration_budget

source_to_gate.source: Hermes Agent run_agent.py max_iterations hard cut-off pattern
source_to_gate.mechanism: Iteration budget consumption tracking; budget-aware intervention before hard cut-off; checkpoint recommendation at configurable thresholds

verification.cargo_test: PASS (43 tests including 6 new iteration_budget tests)

integration: Gene 611 G_apex_ib integrated into apex_gate.rs and apex_gate_health.rs as 6th gain factor; ApexGateReport.compute_delta_g() now multiplies G_apex_ib; gate check added (G_apex_ib ≥ 0.99)
boundary: Integration in apex_gate.rs complete. Still standalone measurement gate — does NOT modify Hermes Agent iteration behavior.
gene_dependency: gene_602 is root of APEX dependency chain: 602→603→604→605→606→607→608
